hero.title: A doctor at your door. No hospital trip needed.
hero.subtitle: We send certified doctors, nurses, and lab technicians to your home across Jordan.

services.title: What we bring to you
services.doctorDesc: A licensed doctor comes to your home, checks on you, and writes a prescription if needed. No waiting room, no commute.
services.nurseDesc: Wound care, injections, IV drips, and daily monitoring — all done at home by a certified nurse.
services.labDesc: A technician collects your samples at home. Digital results sent to your account.
services.radiologyDesc: X-rays and imaging brought to you. The patient doesn't need to go anywhere.

booking.title: Book a Home Visit
booking.subtitle: No account needed. Just tell us where you are.
booking.successMessage: We'll be in touch to confirm your visit. Reference: #{id}
booking.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters
booking.addressMin: Address must be at least 5 characters

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick your service and share your location. No account required. Done in 2 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We match you with a certified doctor, nurse, or technician and send them to your address.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get treated at home, then download your full medical report — no paperwork needed.

cta.title: Don't put it off
cta.subtitle: Create a free account to track your visits, see your reports, and book faster — right from your phone.

auth.title: Welcome Back
auth.subtitle: Sign in to check your requests, reports, and upcoming visits.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join to track your requests, view your reports, and book faster.

requestDetail.title: Request #{id}
requestDetail.timelineSubtitle: Follow your request step by step with a clearer story of what is happening now and what comes next.
requestDetail.timelineStagePending: This stage will unlock automatically when your request moves forward.
requestDetail.timelineJourneyDoneDescription: The request finished its full journey and your final report is available.
requestDetail.timelineEmpty: Every new action on your request appears here in order.

timelineHints.received: We logged your request and prepared it for review.
timelineHints.assigned: A provider has been matched and the visit is being organized.
timelineHints.inProgress: The provider is actively working on your request.
timelineHints.completed: The service is done and the clinical notes are being finalized.
timelineHints.closed: Your request is fully closed and the final report is ready.

timelineEvents.updateDescription: A new activity was recorded on your request.
timelineEvents.packageTasksGeneratedDescription: The system generated the package workflow so the medical team can start coordinating service details.
timelineEvents.taskAssignedDescription: A provider has been attached to your request and can continue the next step.
timelineEvents.taskAcceptedDescription: Your assigned provider accepted the task and is ready to proceed.
timelineEvents.taskSubmittedDescription: One of the request tasks was submitted with status {status}.
timelineEvents.statusAssignedDescription: Your request has moved from waiting to an assigned provider stage.
timelineEvents.statusInProgressDescription: The visit has started and direct coordination is now active.
timelineEvents.statusCompletedDescription: The provider finished the request and the final review is underway.
timelineEvents.statusClosedDescription: The request was closed and your final report is ready to review.
timelineEvents.paymentRecordedDescription: A payment entry was added to this request and is waiting for confirmation if needed.
timelineEvents.paymentApprovedDescription: Your payment record has been reviewed and approved.
timelineEvents.finalReportUpdatedDescription: The final report was updated and is now {status}.
timelineEvents.subReportUpdatedDescription: A provider updated a supporting report and marked it as {status}.
timelineEvents.finalReportApprovedDescription: Admin approved the final report and moved the request closer to closure.
timelineEvents.finalReportConfirmedTitle: Lead doctor confirmed the final report
timelineEvents.finalReportConfirmedDescription: The lead doctor completed the medical confirmation for your final report.
timelineEvents.chatFromYouDescription: You sent a new message in {room}.
timelineEvents.chatFromProviderDescription: Your provider added a new message in {room}.
timelineEvents.chatGenericDescription: A new message was added in {room}.
timelineEvents.orderAddedDescription: The care team added a new order so the request can move through the required medical steps.
timelineEvents.workflowAdvancedDescription: Your request has moved to the next step.
timelineEvents.requestClosedDescription: Admin closed the request and published the final report package.
timelineEvents.publishedDescription: Your final report was published and is ready to download.

status.pendingDescription: Your request has been received and is waiting for review.
status.acceptedDescription: Your request has been accepted and scheduling is in progress.
status.assignedDescription: A provider has been assigned and will contact you if needed.
status.inProgressDescription: Your care team is currently working on the request.
status.completedDescription: The service is complete and your final report is on its way.
status.closedDescription: Your final report is available now.
status.cancelledDescription: This request has been cancelled. Contact support if you need help.

requestDetail.reportPendingDescription: Your report will appear here after the request is closed.
requestDetail.reportReadyDescription: You can review the report details and download the PDF.
requestDetail.reportHidden: The report details will appear here once the request is closed.
requestDetail.chatSubtitle: Your provider can message you here once the service begins.
requestDetail.chatNotAvailableYet: Chat will be available when the service starts
requestDetail.chatMessageHint: Enter to send, Shift + Enter for a new line
requestDetail.chatLocationNotSupported: Location sharing is not supported in this browser
requestDetail.invoiceHiddenDescription: Billing details will appear once the invoice is approved for patient view.
requestDetail.packageHeroDescriptionFallback: This package groups multiple care steps into one coordinated request for the medical team.
requestDetail.packageSummaryDescription: Here is everything included in this package so you can understand the visit clearly before it starts.
requestDetail.packageReadyForCareDescription: All package steps stay linked under one request so your care journey remains organized.
requestDetail.packageIncludedServicesDescription: Consultations, procedures, and imaging already attached to this package.
requestDetail.noPackageServices: No medical or imaging services are linked to this package.
requestDetail.packageIncludedLabTestsDescription: Lab tests that are already part of this package.
requestDetail.noPackageLabTests: No lab tests are linked to this package.

chatPage.adminOnlyDescription: All messages from our team and your active care cases — in one place.
chatPage.inboxDescription: The admin conversation stays first, followed by active care cases and then archived ones by latest activity.
chatPage.generalChatDescription: This inbox is separate from case-based provider chats.
chatPage.selectAdminHint: Choose or start an admin conversation to continue.
chatPage.requestRoomsDescription: Each provider conversation stays grouped under its own care case.
chatPage.noRequestRooms: No care case conversations available yet
chatPage.selectThreadHint: Choose an admin conversation or a care case to continue.
chatPage.requestThreadDescription: Provider conversation linked to this care case.
chatPage.requestClosedNotice: This case conversation is closed because the care case has been completed.
chatPage.chatConnecting: Connecting to the live case room...
chatPage.emptyMessage: Message body or attachment is required
chatPage.chatLocationNotSupported: Location not supported on this device
chatPage.chatLocationAccuracyTooLow: Location accuracy is too low ({meters} m). Move closer to a window or enable GPS, then try again.
chatPage.chatLocationLowAccuracy: Shared but accuracy is low ({meters} m) — try from mobile

dashboardPage.noRequests: You haven't made any requests yet.
dashboardPage.summaryDescription: Here's what's going on with your care.
dashboardPage.pendingInvoicesSummary: You have {count} unpaid invoice(s). Total: {amount} JD

requestsPage.summaryDescription: Track all your care requests in one place — see what's active and what's done.
requestsPage.totalRequestsHint: All requests created under your account.
requestsPage.activeRequestsHint: Requests that are still moving through care steps.
requestsPage.readyReportsHint: Closed requests with a published final report.
requestsPage.awaitingProviderHint: Requests still waiting for provider assignment.
requestsPage.filtersDescription: Filter your requests by the current stage to reach the right status faster.
requestsPage.currentRequestsDescription: These requests are still active and may need your follow-up soon.
requestsPage.archivedRequestsDescription: Finished requests, published reports, and closed care history.
requestsPage.noFilteredRequestsDescription: Try a different filter or switch back to viewing all requests.
requestsPage.emptyDescription: Once you submit your first request, it will appear here with its latest status, provider, and next step.

hero.copy: When you or someone you love needs care, we send a certified doctor, nurse, or lab technician to your home. No hospital trip. No waiting room.
hero.readyLink: Know what you need? Book now

features.speedCopy: Our team gets to you as fast as possible. Available daily.
features.qualityCopy: Every doctor, nurse, and technician is licensed and background-checked.
features.reportsTitle: A full report after every visit
features.reportsCopy: Get a complete digital medical report after every service — ready to download.
features.homeCopy: Get real medical care without leaving home.

board.title: All home care services, one place to book.

signal.title: You see every step of your care, as it happens
signal.copy: From the moment you book until your report is ready, every update is in plain language. No guessing about what's going on.

points.1: One request covers everything — doctor, nurse, lab, or a full care package.
points.2: Every service is built for home delivery, not adapted from a hospital setting.
points.3: Every completed visit ends with a downloadable digital medical report.

categories.title: What do you need today?
categories.copy: Pick the service that fits. We handle everything from there.

medicalVisits.title: Doctor Visits
medicalVisits.summary: A licensed doctor or nurse comes to your home, checks on you, and gives you a diagnosis or prescription — no hospital trip needed.
medicalVisits.routeLabel: Doctor and nurse visits, one booking

nursingCare.title: Home Nursing
nursingCare.summary: Wound dressing, injections, IV drips, and daily monitoring — done at home by a certified nurse.
nursingCare.routeLabel: Nursing care built for home visits

physicalTherapy.title: Physical Therapy
physicalTherapy.summary: Personalized physical therapy sessions to help you recover and regain movement — at home, on your schedule.
physicalTherapy.routeLabel: Rehab sessions designed for home recovery

occupationalTherapy.title: Occupational Therapy
occupationalTherapy.summary: Therapy that helps you rebuild everyday independence — done in your own home environment.
occupationalTherapy.routeLabel: Functional therapy for real daily-life goals

imaging.title: Radiology
imaging.summary: X-rays and imaging brought to your home. The patient doesn't need to travel anywhere.

labDiagnostics.title: Lab Tests
labDiagnostics.summary: A lab technician comes to collect your samples. Digital results delivered to your account.
labDiagnostics.routeLabel: Lab tests with home collection — no clinic visit needed

carePrograms.title: Care Programs
carePrograms.summary: Need more than one service? One request handles multiple steps together.
carePrograms.routeLabel: Bundled programs for complex care needs

workflow.eyebrow: How it works, step by step
workflow.title: From booking to your report — we handle everything in between.
workflow.copy: Pick what you need and we take care of the rest.
workflow.assuranceCopy: Every step has a clear purpose — booking, sending the right person, delivering care, and closing with a report.

step1.title: Pick your service.
step1.copy: Choose what you need from our list. No account required. Takes under 2 minutes.
step1.proof: The right service gets you the right specialist, automatically.

step2.title: We find and send the right person.
step2.copy: We match your request to a licensed doctor, nurse, or technician and send them to your door.
step2.proof: You get a confirmation and can track everything from your account.

step3.title: Get care at home.
step3.copy: Your specialist arrives, does the job, and documents everything. No travel, no waiting room.
step3.proof: You can follow your visit live from your phone.

step4.title: Your report is ready.
step4.copy: After every visit, a full digital report is added to your account. Download it anytime.
step4.proof: Your health history stays in one place — private and always accessible.

guestRequest.title: Book as a guest
guestRequest.description: Fill in your details below and we'll create this request directly — no account needed.
guestRequest.serviceHint: Select the exact option you want to dispatch from this category before confirming the request.
guestRequest.footerNote: After you confirm, the request is submitted using the name, phone number, and address you entered.
guestRequest.error: We couldn't create this request right now. Please try again.

stats.searchReadyCopy: Only the relevant services for this line appear here, which keeps scanning fast.
stats.requestPathCopy: Every option here leads into the correct request setup instead of a generic form.

catalog.title: Browse what's available in this category.
catalog.copy: Find what fits, then book directly from the card.

error.copy: Please try again in a moment.

empty.title: No results for this search.
empty.copy: Try a different word or check back later.

labels.defaultDescription: This service is available for a home visit through Curevie.

bottomBand.title: Pick your service and book it in minutes.
bottomBand.copy: One category, one clear list, one booking flow.

medicalVisits.title: Doctor Visits
medicalVisits.subtitle: A licensed doctor or nurse comes to you — no clinic, no waiting.
medicalVisits.story: Get a full check-up, diagnosis, and prescription without leaving home.
medicalVisits.description: Doctor and nurse visits at home

nursingCare.title: Home Nursing
nursingCare.subtitle: Professional nursing care delivered at home.
nursingCare.story: Wound dressing, injections, monitoring, and follow-up — all at home.

homeNursing.title: Home Nursing
homeNursing.subtitle: Professional nursing care delivered at home.
homeNursing.story: Wound dressing, injections, monitoring, and follow-up — all at home.

physicalTherapy.title: Physical Therapy
physicalTherapy.subtitle: Structured rehab sessions to help you recover at home.
physicalTherapy.story: Build strength, regain movement, and recover safely in your own space.

occupationalTherapy.title: Occupational Therapy
occupationalTherapy.subtitle: Therapy that helps you get back to everyday independence.
occupationalTherapy.story: Improve routine function and daily skills in your own home environment.

imaging.title: Radiology
imaging.subtitle: X-rays and imaging brought to your home.
imaging.story: High-quality imaging without moving the patient. Fast and coordinated.

labDiagnostics.title: Lab Tests
labDiagnostics.subtitle: Home sample collection with digital results.
labDiagnostics.story: A technician comes to you, collects samples, and your results arrive digitally.

carePrograms.title: Care Programs
carePrograms.subtitle: Multiple services bundled into one coordinated request.
carePrograms.story: For when you need more than one service — everything handled together, simply.

footer.eyebrow: We're here when you need us
footer.title: Don't put off your health. We're ready.
footer.copy: Book a home visit, reach out to our team, or browse what we offer.
footer.brandTitle: Home healthcare you can count on.
footer.description: Certified doctors, nurses, and diagnostic services — at your door.
footer.contactCardCopy: Our team is here daily from 8 AM to 10 PM to answer your questions and confirm bookings.
footer.responseValue: Call us or message on WhatsApp
footer.trustPoint1: Certified doctors, nurses, and technicians sent to your door.
footer.trustPoint3: Full digital report after every completed visit.
footer.bottomNote: Care at home. Fast. Certified. Documented.

hero.copy: We started Curevie because getting good healthcare at home was harder than it should be. We built a simple way to get a doctor, nurse, or lab test delivered to your door.
hero.railTitle: You shouldn't have to navigate a complicated system when you're unwell.
hero.railCopy: We built Curevie so the process stays simple for the patient. You tell us what you need. We take care of the rest.

homeFirst.title: Built for home delivery
homeFirst.copy: Everything we offer is designed to work safely and well inside your home.

singlePath.title: One clear path
singlePath.copy: Even complex care stays simple for you — one request, one tracking view, one report.

documented.title: Always documented
documented.copy: Every visit ends with a proper medical report — yours to keep and review anytime.

pillars.title: Three things we never compromise on.
pillars.copy: These aren't values on a wall. They're how we actually build and run the service.
pillars.boardTitle: Built around you, not around the system.
pillars.boardCopy: Good healthcare needs structure and timing — but always with the patient at the center.

clarity.title: You should always know what's happening.
clarity.copy: Every step of your care is visible. No black boxes, no guessing.
clarity.proof: Live status updates and plain-language descriptions at every stage.

coordination.title: You focus on getting better. We handle the rest.
coordination.copy: Scheduling, matching, dispatch — we take care of all of it so you don't have to.
coordination.proof: You follow one simple request. We manage everything behind it.

closure.title: Every visit ends with a real medical record.
closure.copy: When your care is done, you get a proper report — not a verbal summary.
closure.proof: Full medical reports, downloadable and accessible from your account.

architecture.title: How the platform manages your health journey.
architecture.copy: To the patient, the experience remains calm and guided. Beneath that, the platform is routing and coordinating to ensure clinical precision at every interval.
architecture.boardCopy: Under Every request, Curevie aligns the clinical lane, the operational sequence, and the digital outcome into one coherent story.

lane.title: Starting with the correct medical frame.
lane.copy: You never start from an empty form. The clinical lane itself determines the intent and shapes the request accurately from the first interaction.
lane.proof: Context-aware entry points remove the guesswork before the care even begins.

coordination.title: Translating choice into a clinical path.
coordination.copy: Once initiated, Curevie coordinates the internal path required for specialized providers and diagnostic steps without cluttering your experience.
coordination.proof: You follow one visible request while the system manages the deeper logic of your care.

outcome.title: Concluding with clarity and record.
outcome.copy: Closure must be visible. Every request ends with a digital result or recorded next step that resides in your permanent health profile.
outcome.proof: The final clinical state is designed to be reviewable, ensuring nothing is lost in transition.

signature.title: Healthcare that feels like someone actually cares.
signature.copy: We're not building technology for its own sake. We're building a better way to get medical help at home — clear, fast, and honest.
signature.quote: We built Curevie so you always know what's happening with your care.

hero.copy: Whether you want to book a visit, ask about a service, or follow up on a request — we're available and we respond.
hero.panelTitle: A real answer, not a form letter.
hero.panelCopy: We read every message and reply with a direct answer — not a generic response.

guidance.title: Service guidance
guidance.copy: Not sure which service you need? We'll help you figure it out.

followUp.title: Request follow-up
followUp.copy: Have an active request? We can check on it for you.

routing.title: Fast routing
routing.copy: Your message goes to the right person — no dead ends.

workspace.title: Send us a message or call directly.
workspace.copy: Use the form for detailed questions. For urgent needs, call or WhatsApp us.

form.title: Send us a message
form.copy: Tell us what you need and we'll get back to you.

message.label: Your message
message.placeholder: What do you need help with?

form.assurance: Your message is handled securely by our team.

coverage.title: Who we serve
coverage.copy: We're built for patients who want real medical care delivered at home — clear, fast, and fully documented.

publicContact.validationError: Please fill in all required fields.
publicContact.success: Message received. We'll be in touch soon.
publicContact.error: Couldn't send your message right now. Please try again.

consent.banner_description: We use necessary cookies to make our site work. With your consent we also use analytics and marketing cookies.
consent.necessary_description: Required for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.
consent.analytics_description: Anonymous usage data to help us improve the site.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

first.text: My father had a fever at midnight. The doctor was at our door within two hours and did a full check-up at home. I didn't even know this kind of service existed.
first.name: Ahmad K.

second.text: After surgery, my mother needed daily wound dressing. The nurse came to our home every morning. We never had to take her back to the hospital.
second.name: Sara M.

third.text: I needed blood tests but couldn't get out. The technician came the same day. My results were ready by evening.
third.name: Lina A.

reportsPage.title: My Reports
reportsPage.description: Your medical reports, organized by visit. View what was included and download any report as a PDF.
reportsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by visit, service, or provider
reportsPage.searchHint: Files are grouped by service so you can see exactly what belongs to each part of your visit.
reportsPage.empty: No reports yet. They'll appear here after your first completed visit.
reportsPage.loadError: We couldn't load your reports right now.
reportsPage.includedServicesDescription: Each service is listed separately so you can see exactly what was done.
reportsPage.sourceFilesDescription: These are the files uploaded by the care team and attached to each service before they were merged into the final report.
reportsPage.noSourceFiles: No files attached to this visit yet.
reportsPage.noFilesForService: No files attached to this service.

validation.phoneMin: Phone number must meet international standards
validation.newPasswordMin: New password must meet the minimum length requirement
